notes: Wellness brief with explicit colorsToAvoid covering the lime-green failure mode. All background-tier fields (primaryLight, neutral) MUST be low-chroma; no electric/fluorescent green even if WCAG passes. The colorsToAvoid array uses pt-BR ('verde neon') and English ('neon green', 'lime green') variants — the prompt must treat all three as perceptual exclusions, not exact-code filters.
